figures.caption: Figure 7: Memory consumption of GNN training under vertex partitioning (DistDGL): peak RAM usage acrossWorkers and peak GPU usage across workers. Blue bars represent streaming approaches, while orange bars represent in-memory approaches.
Figure 1: Comparison of GNN partitioning paradigms for distributed training.

Figure 2: Quality Metrics for edge partitioners by dataset and partitioner. Blue bars represent streaming approaches, while orange bars represent in-memory approaches. The dashed horizontal line indicates the optimal value, if there is one.

Figure 3: Quality metrics for vertex partitioners by dataset and partitioner. Blue bars represent streaming approaches, while orange bars represent in-memory approaches. The dashed horizontal line indicates the optimal value, if there is one.
